verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Isaac in Jakob sam a, amah thupha pia-in thuhilh a, “Nang in Kanaan numeite na ten'pih kei ding hi
Kithawi in la, na nu' pa Bethuel' inn, Paddanaram-ah pai in. Tua lai munah na nu' sanggampa Laban' tanute khat na zi dingin la in
Nang, mihonpi khat na suah theihna dingin Vanglian Pasian in nang thupha hong pia-in, hong pungsakin, tampi hong phasak hen
Pasian in Abraham' tunga a piak, tawlkhat sung na omna leitang na neih theihna dingin nang leh na suanlekhakte tungah amah in Abraham' thupha hong pia ta hen!” a ci hi
Tua bangin Isaac in Jakob sawlkhia hi. Jakob leh Esau' nu Rebekah' sanggampa, Aram mi Bethuel' tapa Laban' omna Paddanaram-ah amah a pai hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Esau in Zi dang La Thuah

verses.text: Isaac in Jakob thupha pia-in, zi la dingin Paddanaram-ah sawl a, thupha a piak kawmin amah thuhilhin, “Kanaan numeite na ten'pih kei ding hi,” a cihna leh
Jakob in a nu leh a pa' thu mangin Paddanaram-ah a paina thu tu-in Esau in thei hi
Tua ahih ciangin Kanaan numeite in a pa lungkimsaklo cih Esau in a theih ciangin
Ishmael' kiangah Esau pai-in, ama zi neihsa banah, Nebaioth' sanggamnu, Abraham' tapa Ishmael' tanu Mahalath zi-in a la hi.
Jakob in Beersheba khua nusia-in Haran lamah a pai hi
Amah mun khat tungin, ni tum khin ahih manin tua lai-ah tua zan a giak hi. Tua muna suangte khat la-in, amah in lukhamin zang a, a ihmu dingin tua munah a lumsuk hi
Amah in mang man a, leitungah kahlei khat kiphutin, a kahlei dawn in van ban hi. Pasian' vantung mite tua kahlei tungah kah to-in a kum suk a mu hi
En in, tua sanah Topa ding a, “Kei pen na pa Abraham' Pasian leh Isaac' Pasian, Topa ka hi hi. Nang leh na suanlekhakte' tungah tu-a na lupna leitang kong pia ding hi

Na suanlekhakte leilak leivui zah pha ding a, nitumna lam leh nisuahna lam, leilu lam leh leitaw lamah na kizelthang ding uh hi. Nang leh na suanlekhakte thupha kong piak bangin leitung minam khempeuh in thupha a ngahna dingun hong ngen ding uh hi

En in, keimah in nang hong ompihin na paina peuhah kong kem ding a, hih leitangah nang kong paipih kik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang' tunga kong gensa thute ka hih khit matengin nang kong nusia kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a ihmutna panin Jakob khanglo a, “Hih lai munah Topa om taktak hi; keimah in tua thu ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi
Amah lau a, “Hih mun bangzahin lauhuai ahi hiam! Hih pen Pasian' inn lo adang hilo a, hih pen vantung lutna kongpi ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Jakob tho baih a, amah in lukhamin a zat suang la-in khuamin phut a, a tungah sathau a sung hi
Amah in tua mun Bethel ci hi. Ahih hangin a masa-in tua khua min pen Luz ahi hi
Tua ciangin Jakob in thuciamna khat bawlin, “Pasian in kei hong ompih a, hih ka paina lampi-ah kei hong kep a, nek ding an leh silh ding puan hong piak a
lungnuam takin ka pa' inn-ah ka ciahkik leh, Topa pen keima Pasian hi ding a
khuamin ka phuhsa hih suang pen Pasian' inn hi ding hi. Keima tungah nangmah in nong piak khempeuh sawmah khat nang' tungah kong pia kik ding hi,” a ci hi.
